title: Mob Drops Recipes [End]
description: Now you can craft drops from hostile mobs in the End!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mob_Drop_Recipes/BH_MDRE_Header.webp) Now you can craft drops from hostile mobs in the End! Basically, the mod allows you to craft all the items that can only be obtained by killing a hostile mob. This is ideal for all those thematic modpacks that eliminate certain enemies, or simply to facilitate obtaining these much-needed resources in the game. There are two ways to craft these items, the first, by using common MC materials, and the second, by using a new element, the essence of the End. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mob_Drop_Recipes/BH_MDRE_Summary.webp) The goal of this mod is to fulfill the desire of many players, which is none other than to allow you to make slabs using a lot of different building blocks, as well as new varieties. For example, players will have the opportunity to obtain new wooden tiles, or even tiles made from mineral blocks. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mob_Drop_Recipes/BH_MDRE_FAQ.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mob_Drop_Recipes/BH_MDRE_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rT4FBoKu/images/8441bae9e69f8d6c4b6f46f1eed6c8404de14959.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rT4FBoKu/images/9a5744f1d6f55ff934dbe4f378a33114adf191cd.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
